About Me

ERP expertise meets
people development

I'm a SAP S/4HANA Materials Management (MM) Certified professional with hands-on knowledge of the complete Procure-to-Pay (P2P) cycle — from Purchase Requisition and Purchase Orders through Goods Receipt and Invoice Verification using ME51N, ME21N, MIGO, and MIRO.

Beyond technical expertise, I've built a track record of people development — mentoring 75+ learners as a Project Mentor at Infosys Springboard, and founding Skillenity Academy, a free career readiness platform that has driven 20+ successful placements across Puducherry through partnerships with 10+ colleges.

My B.Tech in Computer Science & Business Systems (CSBS) — a TCS-designed program blending technology with business — gives me a unique lens: I understand both the technical architecture of SAP and the business processes it powers.
